metrics.name: Hedge integrity
metrics.desc:
Backing assets: BTC, ETH, SOL, ETH LSTs, USDC, USDT
Hedge instruments: perpetual futures and deliverable futures
Hedge strategy: delta-neutral (spot collateral vs short derivatives)
Hedge adjustment trigger: mint and redeem activity
Hedge management: off-chain hedging system
Hedge operations: pricing, order routing, risk monitoring, reconciliation
Intervention mode: automated + manual
Hedge transparency: no full public proof of derivatives positions
Funding stress buffer: reserve fund (~$46M as of Q4 2024)

metrics.name: Hedge integrity
metrics.desc:
Hedge design is clear and actively managed.
However hedge execution is off-chain and operationally dependent.
Transparency of hedge positions is incomplete.

metrics.name: Collateral custody integrity
metrics.desc:
Custody model: Off-Exchange Settlement (OES)
Custody providers: Copper, Ceffu, Fireblocks
Asset custody location: Held with OES providers
Exchange exposure: Collateral not transferred to exchange balance sheets
Transparency: Partial on-chain wallet visibility
Custodial attestations: Monthly attestations expected where assets are omnibus
Custody insurance: Not disclosed

metrics.name: Collateral custody integrity
metrics.desc:
OES model reduces exchange bankruptcy exposure.
Custody still relies on centralized providers.
Limited visibility of omnibus accounts.

metrics.name: Exchange and counterparty integrity
metrics.desc:
Exchange counterparties: Binance, OKX, Deribit, Bybit
Custody counterparties: Copper, Ceffu, Fireblocks
Leverage policy: not disclosed

metrics.name: Exchange and counterparty integrity
metrics.desc:
Exchange diversification exists.
Custody diversification exists.
However both depend entirely on CeFi venues.

metrics.name: Operational risk management
metrics.desc:
Hedge operations: off-chain hedging system
Core functions: pricing, routing, reconciliation, risk monitoring
Exposure checks: real-time portfolio risk validation
Intervention mode: automated + manual
Asset movement orchestration: yes
Dependency monitoring: yes
Rebalancing model: event-driven around mint/redeem
Public operational metrics: limited
Historical operational incidents: not disclosed
Operational concentration: high off-chain dependency

metrics.name: Operational risk management
metrics.desc:
Operations appear structured and actively monitored.
Depends heavily on off-chain processes and human/operational responsiveness.
Limited public evidence on operational track record makes this harder to score strongly.

metrics.name: Jurisdictional clarity
metrics.desc:
Issuer: Ethena Labs
Mint/redeem counterparties: KYC required
Exchange counterparties: Binance, OKX, Deribit, Bybit
Custody counterparties: Copper, Ceffu, Fireblocks

metrics.name: Jurisdictional clarity
metrics.desc:
Only KYC-ed users can mint/redeem USDe.
Cross-jurisdiction dependencies increase regulatory surface.
A regulatory action affecting any one of the counterparties could affect operations.

metrics.name: Governance power distribution and participation
metrics.desc:
Governance: Different multisigs set up
Key system configuration decisions largely protocol-controlled
Protocol multisig threshold: 5 out of 11
Reserves multisig threshold: 4 out of 10
Protocol controls: allowed collateral assets, custodian addresses, mint, redeem
Admin controls: grant and revoke roles

metrics.name: Governance power distribution and participation
metrics.desc:
Governance is currently centralized.
Operational changes can likely be influenced by a small group.

metrics.name: Transparency of reserves and hedge positions
metrics.desc:
Monitoring dashboards: Real-time dashboard available showing Ethena current positions
On-chain collateral: Partially verifiable
Hedge positions: Not fully provable

metrics.name: Transparency of reserves and hedge positions
metrics.desc:
Limited hedge transparency increases monitoring difficulty.
Market participants cannot independently verify full hedge coverage.

metrics.name: Hedge design robustness
metrics.desc:
Strategy: delta-neutral hedge
Reserve fund for negative funding stress

metrics.name: Hedge design robustness
metrics.desc:
Hedge construction is structurally sound.
Reserve fund reduces funding volatility risk.

metrics.name: Collateral quality safeguards
metrics.desc:
Collateral types: BTC, ETH, SOL, LSTs, USDC, USDT
Mechanism: Admin multisig must approve new backing collaterals

metrics.name: Collateral quality safeguards
metrics.desc:
Highly liquid assets reduce backing risk.
Governance approval required for new collateral.

metrics.name: Counterparty diversification safeguards
metrics.desc:
Exchanges: Binance, OKX, Deribit, Bybit
Custodians: Copper, Ceffu, Fireblocks
OES structure separates custody and trading

metrics.name: Counterparty diversification safeguards
metrics.desc: Multiple venues reduce single-counterparty risk.

metrics.name: Margin and liquidation safeguards
metrics.desc:
Margin asset: USDT
Margin model: cross-margin perpetual futures
Margin buffer policy: not publicly disclosed
Liquidation thresholds: exchange-defined
Reserve fund: ~$46M
Automated margin management: yes
Liquidation incidents: None disclosed

metrics.name: Margin and liquidation safeguards
metrics.desc:
$46M reserve fund meant to absorb margin stress.
Margin stress and funding volatility remain potential risks.

metrics.name: Redemption and liquidity safeguards
metrics.desc:
Direct redemption available: Yes
Direct redemption permissionless: No
Eligible redeemers: Approved counterparties only
Access control: REDEEMER_ROLE required
Mechanism: Redeemer submits USDe, receives underlying collateral, USDe is burned
Execution model: Atomic on-chain execution after off-chain validation
Redemption cap: Max redeem per block
Secondary market access: USDe also tradable on DEXs and CEXs

metrics.name: Redemption and liquidity safeguards
metrics.desc:
Redemption is not permissionless.
Depends on approved counterparties along with off-chain validation.
Per-block caps and role-gated access add friction under stress.

metrics.name: Operational complexity
metrics.desc:
On-chain functionality: minting, redemption, role management
Off-chain functionality: hedging system, risk monitoring
Counterparties: Copper, Ceffu, Fireblocks, Binance, OKX, Deribit, Bybit
Dependencies: exchanges, custodians, off-chain hedging infrastructure

metrics.name: Operational complexity
metrics.desc: High operational complexity increases failure surface.

metrics.name: Emergency roles risk
metrics.desc:
Privileged roles: DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE
Privileged role controls: change supported assets and custody addresses

metrics.name: Emergency roles risk
metrics.desc: Emergency roles improve safety but introduce centralized control.
